[OCR] Add HTML report to eval_fixtures; regenerate artifacts at d138a2b b8f9b317837d168558ab39422a55bfe83072eae9 Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com> eval_20260627_002  ·  2026-06-27 23:07:42.367927 UTC
PASS 5.9% mean CER  (threshold < 30%)

All 3 images passed the 30% CER threshold. Best: doc2.png (4.5%). Worst: doc3.png (6.7%).

Character Error Rate (CER) — edit distance between recognised and expected text, divided by the length of the expected text. Lower is better; 0% = perfect match.
< 10% excellent 10–30% acceptable 30–60% poor > 60% failing > 100% hypothesis longer than reference
